prompt: Using elements from the reference underwater scene, generate a computer graphics visualization for object detection. Show distinct starfish and sea urchins on a rocky seabed, emphasizing clear object boundaries despite the murky green water effect.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics visualization for object detection. Using the visual style and environment of image 1, depict a murky green underwater scene with a rocky seabed. Feature a distinct blue starfish with orange markings prominently on the mid-right of the seabed, and multiple dark, spiky sea urchins scattered across the bottom-right. Crucially, ensure all object boundaries are sharp and clear, facilitating object detection, despite the overall murky green water effect.
objects: distinct blue starfish with orange markings prominently on the mid-right of the seabed
multiple dark, spiky sea urchins scattered across the bottom-right
